findings.message: fetch_latest_signals returns a 'formatted report' but no output structure (fields, types, section headings) is defined in the skill body
render_drawio_to_html output described only as 'a viewable HTML file'; no structure for the XML content or HTML wrapper is specified
Section heading '### 1. Generate Draw.io Diagrams' appears twice in sequence (lines 14 and 17), wasting tokens
get_market_summary returns a 'formatted report of active prediction markets' with no defined fields or Markdown structure

Outbound HTTP GET to https://newsnow.busiyi.world — a third-party Chinese aggregation service not under the repo owner's control; compromise of this host can inject malicious content into the agent's context
get_base_forecast return type is List[KLinePoint] but KLinePoint fields (date, open, high, low, close, volume) are not defined in the SKILL.md body
'subjectively adjust the numbers based on latest news/logic' — 'subjectively' provides no criteria for how the agent should adjust forecast values
Section heading '### 1. Forecast Market Trends' appears twice (lines 14 and 16), wasting tokens
Code example imports KronosPredictorUtility from 'scripts.utils.kronos_predictor' but the file is at scripts/kronos_predictor.py (not scripts/utils/); raises ModuleNotFoundError at runtime
Fallback path at line 83 drops weights_only=True when it raises TypeError/RuntimeError/AttributeError, silently bypassing the pickle safety guard

ast.literal_eval applied to strings extracted from external API responses; safer than eval but processes untrusted input — a crafted response could trigger MemoryError or expose unexpected Python literals
torch.load called without weights_only=True; pickle deserialization of an untrusted .pt file can execute arbitrary code

evaluation.py, training.py, json_utils.py, and database_manager.py are physically copied across alphaear-predictor, alphaear-signal-tracker, and alphaear-reporter; security fixes must be applied to three independent copies
The workflow generates 'professional financial reports' but no Markdown template, required sections, or output schema is defined
Top-level heading '## Capabilities' appears twice (lines 13 and 15), wasting tokens
Identical to predictor finding #1 — torch.load without weights_only=True in a duplicated evaluation script
search() return type is defined but aggregate_search() has no documented return type or structure
'if the local tool is insufficient' — no accuracy threshold or failure criterion is defined for when to switch from FinBERT to LLM analysis
Top-level heading '## Capabilities' appears twice (lines 13 and 15)
Output is described only as 'Updated Signal' with no schema; confidence, intensity, and status fields are not defined in the SKILL.md body
'Use alphaear-search and alphaear-stock skills to gather the necessary data' — 'necessary' is undefined without specifying which data points are required
Section heading '### 1. Track Signal Evolution' appears twice (lines 14 and 17)
SKILL.md instructs the agent to use alphaear-search and alphaear-stock skills but neither is declared as a dependency; if either skill is absent the workflow silently degrades
Identical to predictor finding #1 — torch.load without weights_only=True in a duplicated evaluation script
'Set Appropriate Degrees of Freedom' — 'Appropriate' provides no measurable criteria for selecting constraint level
'For simple edits, modify the XML directly' — 'simple' is undefined without specifying edit scope or complexity threshold
